title: Refactor Input component: shared tokens, textarea, password toggle, slots, remove label
description: ## Overview Refactor the Input component (shared/ui/primitives/Input/) to align with the design system and add missing functionality. ## Tasks ### 1. Shared design tokens for control sizing - Replace hardcoded height/font-size/padding values (36px/46px/56px) with shared CSS variables - Create unified control size tokens that are shared across Input, Button, and future form controls - Variables needed: --control-height-sm, --control-height-md, --control-height-lg, --control-font-size-sm/md/lg, --control-border-radius - Ensure Button component also uses these shared tokens for consistency ### 2. Textarea support - Add `textarea` boolean prop to render QInput in textarea mode - Add `autogrow` prop support - Add `rows` prop for fixed-height textarea - Add textarea examples to InputsPage ### 3. Password visibility toggle - Add `togglePassword` boolean prop - When type='password' and togglePassword=true, show eye/eye-off icon in append slot - Toggle between type='password' and type='text' on click - Use Tabler icons (ti-eye / ti-eye-off) consistent with the project ### 4. Disabled & Readonly examples - Add Disabled and Readonly sections to InputsPage with examples - Show both states for text, email, password inputs ### 5. Remove label from Input - Remove the `{{ label }}` from Input.vue - Remove label-related props from InputProps - Label will be handled by FieldControl component (layrix-fgi) ### 6. Before/After slots - Add `before` and `after` slots (rendered outside the input field border) - These map to QInput's before/after slots - Different from prepend/append which render inside the field - Add examples to InputsPage ### 7. Clean up InputProps types - Fix Omit — currently passes through all Quasar props - Define explicit props interface with only the props we want to expose - Ensure proper type isolation from Quasar ### 8. Error state examples - Add Error section to InputsPage with examples - Show error state with error message - Show error with custom error-message text - Show inline validation errors (e.g. required field, email format) ### 9. InputsPage: wrap all fields with FieldControl - After FieldControl (layrix-fgi) is implemented, update InputsPage to use `` around all Input examples - Remove any standalone labels from the page - This ensures the demo page is a reference for proper field usage ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] All control components share common size CSS variables - [ ] Textarea mode works with autogrow - [ ] Password toggle shows/hides password with eye icon - [ ] InputsPage has disabled, readonly, textarea, before/after slot, **error** examples - [ ] Label removed from Input (no breaking change since FieldControl doesn't exist yet) - [ ] Before/After slots work correctly - [ ] InputProps explicitly defines supported props (no full QInputProps passthrough) - [ ] Error states demonstrated on InputsPage - [ ] All InputsPage examples wrapped with FieldControl component

title: Typography: обновить Card (h5/span → Typography для title/caption)
Dropdown: создать DropdownItem компонент
description: Компонент элемента списка на базе QItem. Props: icon, label, caption, endIcon, end (слот), disabled. Стилизация согласно дизайн-системе.

title: Dropdown: экспорт из shared/ui
description: Добавить экспорт Dropdown, DropdownItem и типов в shared/ui/index.ts

title: Dropdown: создать DropdownSheet (mobile bottom sheet)
description: Mobile версия на базе QDialog с position=bottom. Слоты: before, after. Кнопка Cancel (опциональная через showCancel). ОБЯЗАТЕЛЬНО: drag-to-close gesture (потянуть вниз для закрытия) - реализовать через touch events или v-touch-pan directive от Quasar.

title: Dropdown: создать DropdownMenu (desktop версия)
description: Desktop версия на базе QMenu. Слоты: trigger, before, after. Поддержка items[] и sections[]. Анимации transition-show/hide.

title: Create FieldControl wrapper component
description: ## Overview Create a FieldControl component in shared/ui/primitives/FieldControl/ that wraps form controls (Input, future Select, etc.) and provides a consistent label + field layout. ## ⚠️ Pre-implementation: Research Quasar label behavior **FIRST** — investigate how Quasar QInput handles labels internally: - QInput may already wrap the field in a `

title: Dropdown: создать типы (DropdownItem, DropdownSection, DropdownProps)
description: Создать файл Dropdown.types.ts с интерфейсами: DropdownItem (icon, label, caption, endIcon, end, onClick, disabled, separator), DropdownSection (caption, items), DropdownProps (items, showCancel, cancelLabel и др.)

title: DropdownPage: создать демо страницу с примерами
description: Страница pages/ui-ux/DropdownPage.vue с примерами: базовый dropdown, с секциями, с иконками, с before/after слотами, desktop vs mobile preview. Добавить роут.

title: Typography: обновить PageContainer (h1/p → Typography для title/subtitle)
HeaderUserDropdown: создать user dropdown в хедере
description: Обновить HeaderUserButton для использования Dropdown. Содержимое: user info (avatar, name, email) в before слоте, пункты меню (Profile, Settings, Logout и др.), разделители между секциями.

title: Dropdown: создать адаптивный Dropdown компонент
description: Главный компонент, который переключается между DropdownMenu (desktop) и DropdownSheet (mobile) на основе $q.screen.lt.sm. Единый API для обоих режимов.
